operational_contract: A checked layout witness partitions one generative byte carrier into nonoverlapping typed logical places; live bytes never change type without a proved vacant partition bijection.
structural_cost_rule: Static layout evidence erases; runtime-dependent layouts pay only selected checked arithmetic or descriptors.

operational_contract: Create an inline, virtual, or admitted heap carrier whose complete typed partition is vacant and whose release authority is linear.
structural_cost_rule: No payload initialization, Copy, Clone, Default, occupancy bitmap, or per-slot tag is introduced.

operational_contract: Repackage an already-full inline aggregate as one generative full carrier without reading, moving, copying, or reinitializing payload bytes.
structural_cost_rule: Zero payload traffic and zero allocation; only proof identity changes.

operational_contract: Apply a bidirectional checked isomorphism between sealed full-storage representations while preserving the exact allocation root, extent, live values, disposition, and sole ownership.
structural_cost_rule: Zero payload traffic and zero allocation; the physical owner and representation are unchanged.

operational_contract: Use the Full-to-Vac-plus-owner isomorphism in either direction under exact move authority and with incompatible loans absent.
structural_cost_rule: Exactly the algorithm-required owner transfers; no clone, default value, spare payload, or topology metadata.

operational_contract: Take the displaced owner and put the offered owner into the same live place while returning the displaced owner.
structural_cost_rule: Exactly two ownership transfers; no swap, clone, allocation, or hidden destruction.

operational_contract: After proving logical footprints disjoint, take both affine values and put each into the opposite vacancy before resealing.
structural_cost_rule: Exactly the algorithm-required exchange traffic; no allocation or runtime borrow table on the static path.

operational_contract: Split exact footprints, issue root-and-epoch-tied shared or unique loans, and rejoin the escrowed authority when every child loan ends.
structural_cost_rule: Static partitions and loans erase; only contract-selected dynamic distinctness checks remain.

operational_contract: Replace one checked logical partition with a proved layout-and-ownership bijection over the same carrier, retiring the old epoch and invalidating old facts.
structural_cost_rule: Zero payload reads, writes, moves, copies, allocations, releases, or behavior calls.

operational_contract: Use the fixed CoreCopy theorem to preserve the source while initializing or trivially overwriting the destination; overlapping ranges follow memmove ordering.
structural_cost_rule: Exactly the declared Copy traffic; zero Clone, producer, Default, destructor, or other behavior calls.

operational_contract: Represent each live zero-sized element by a distinct logical root-epoch-index owner token; address equality or inequality grants no authority.
structural_cost_rule: Zero payload bytes and allocator calls; checked logical length and exact logical destruction remain.

operational_contract: Seal representation-selected roots, metadata, live and vacant resources, and invariants behind an ordinary producer-defined checked owner.
structural_cost_rule: Proof state erases; runtime state is exactly the selected algorithm representation.

operational_contract: Open a sealed owner only under a control-flow judgment that closes, transfers, or disposes every resource on every normal edge.
structural_cost_rule: No runtime focus token; repair traffic is only the algorithm-required work.

operational_contract: Run statically selected verified disposition over exactly the live subset, close every applicable lease, then release each empty root once.
structural_cost_rule: No destructor pointer, registry, or full-capacity scan; exact generated cost remains unmeasured.

operational_contract: Index the opaque owner by every retained external root and preserve each borrow leaf through storage, movement, projection, calls, results, and disposition without extending its region.
structural_cost_rule: Static provenance erases; region-free values acquire no lifetime field, table, branch, or relocation check.

operational_contract: Carry a shared source loan plus an exact remaining-footprint map and yield root-preserving reborrows in frozen order.
structural_cost_rule: O(1) selected cursor state and no intermediate collection or per-element allocation.

operational_contract: Partition disjoint unique footprints, yield one bounded child authority at a time, and return the remainder on stop or disposal.
structural_cost_rule: No runtime borrow table on the static unique-owner route.

operational_contract: Take each yielded owner from the remaining live interval and use verified disposition for the exact unconsumed remainder.
structural_cost_rule: One move per yielded owner; no clone or per-element allocation solely for traversal.

operational_contract: Invoke the declared Clone or clone-from contract with exact count, order, effects, result provenance, abort prefix, and environment disposition.
structural_cost_rule: Only explicitly declared Clone work; zero-call outcomes execute no Clone call.

operational_contract: Invoke a producer, mapper, iterator, or conversion behavior under its exact owner, result, effect, failure, and abort contract.
structural_cost_rule: Only declared calls and behavior-owned allocation; no implicit Clone or Default premise.

operational_contract: Invoke exactly the explicitly required Default behavior before replacing the selected live value.
structural_cost_rule: One declared Default call when the exact outcome requires it; empty-owner construction does not use this route.

operational_contract: Invoke the declared comparator, hasher, predicate, index behavior, key function, or other ordinary callable with exact branch accounting.
structural_cost_rule: Direct monomorphized calls on the static route; no mandatory dynamic dispatch.

operational_contract: Check every element, byte, layout, capacity, and logical-length calculation before the registered commitment point.
structural_cost_rule: Required checks remain unless machine-proved; no ownership transfer precedes a failing precommit check.

operational_contract: Call the one admitted allocator edge with exact success, recoverable failure, and abort dispositions for roots and offered owners.
structural_cost_rule: Exactly the allocation attempts named by the selected outcome; zero calls on allocation-inapplicable routes.

operational_contract: Complete every recoverable preparation and acquire replacement carriers before the first destructive owner transfer, then relocate infallibly inside focus.
structural_cost_rule: Only selected preparation and direct relocation traffic; impossible unknown-length rollback is not promised.

operational_contract: Reach the exact registered normal post-state by resealing, transferring, or terminally disposing every named resource.
structural_cost_rule: No runtime exit mechanism beyond selected disposition work.

operational_contract: Return the registered error plus every precommit owner unchanged before any destructive commitment.
structural_cost_rule: Zero rollback traffic unless the exact contract explicitly selects rollback or partial progress.

operational_contract: Permit trap without unwind only after proving the registered pre-abort safety invariant and exact call prefix.
structural_cost_rule: No cleanup or unwind work is charged after trap.

operational_contract: Reject every writer-visible raw initialization, length, alignment, spare-as-T, or unchecked-access request before executable code exists.
structural_cost_rule: No runtime path, branch, helper, or timed arm.

operational_contract: Preserve an exact dependency on a separately scoped later family instead of crediting the current basis with the excluded contract.
structural_cost_rule: No current-family runtime path or performance credit.

operational_contract: Preserve an unresolved owner policy choice and prohibit the excluded or conditional route from counting as a derived capability.
structural_cost_rule: No performance or expressibility credit until the named policy is selected.

operational_contract: Record that an exact outcome cannot occur in a fully selected payload and policy subcontext, without treating impossibility as an unresolved policy or a positive capability.
structural_cost_rule: No runtime path, authority, allocation, or performance credit.

operational_contract: Reject a full-rollback claim for a fallible unknown-length producer unless a bound, external buffer, partial-progress result, or abort policy is selected.
structural_cost_rule: No hidden buffering, replay, clone, or pathological rollback simulation.

operational_contract: Bind a checked live-set or refinement proposition to exact owner version, invalidators, consumers, and final code.
structural_cost_rule: Proof metadata erases; checks remain when proof is unavailable.

operational_contract: Preserve exact root, footprint, region, and disjointness provenance through lowering and invalidate it on every incompatible transition.
structural_cost_rule: Proof metadata erases; no runtime lookup on the static path.

operational_contract: Reserve the frozen fixed-buffer and append-only-pool controls for unchanged-source, layout, optimized-body, and structural-counter comparison.
structural_cost_rule: No measured or generated-code PASS is claimed before a separately authorized candidate and protocol run.
